info.name: CloudSupport AI
info.description: Postman collection for CloudSupport AI FastAPI backend. Scenarios cover cloud computing and LLM technical support workflows.

request.description: Check whether the CloudSupport AI backend is running.
Ask a knowledge-base support question. Rule fallback works by default; configured model providers enable fuller RAG answers.
Classify and route an overseas CDN 504 support ticket.

body.raw:
{
  "method": "POST",
  "url": "https://ark.ap-southeast.byteplusapi.com/api/v3/chat/completions",
  "status_code": 401,
  "error_message": "Unauthorized: invalid api key or token is expired",
  "request_id": "req_byteplus_llm_401_20260428_001",
  "response_body": "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"Unauthorized\",\"message\":\"The API key is invalid or does not have access to this model.\"}}"
}

{
  "method": "POST",
  "url": "https://ark.ap-southeast.byteplusapi.com/api/v3/chat/completions",
  "status_code": 429,
  "error_message": "Rate limit exceeded for model endpoint. Please retry later.",
  "request_id": "req_byteplus_llm_429_20260428_002",
  "response_body": "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"TooManyRequests\",\"message\":\"RPM/TPM quota exceeded for current workspace.\"}}"
}

request.description: Diagnose LLM API rate limit and quota errors.

item.name: Log Analyze - Video First Frame Slow

request.description: Analyze playback logs for first-frame latency.

item.name: Ticket Reply - English Function Calling Issue

request.description: Generate a professional support reply for an overseas LLM Function Calling ticket.
Collect required information before escalating a technical support issue.

body.raw:
{
  "workflow": "api-debug",
  "rating": "useful",
  "question": "API returned 429 for chat/completions",
  "answer": "Check rate limit, quota, retry policy and request volume.",
  "comment": "The troubleshooting steps are actionable.",
  "source": "postman"
}

request.description: Save answer quality feedback to the local JSONL feedback file.
